name: Observatory
description: Pair this OpenClaw gateway with the Observatory viewer (web / iOS).

defaultHost.description: Hostname or LAN IP for the gateway. Defaults to 127.0.0.1.

eventsPath.description: WebSocket path on the gateway that emits AgentEvent-shaped messages.

label.description: Friendly label shown in Observatory's status pill.

tls.description: Generate wss:// pair URLs by default. Requires OpenClaw to be behind a TLS-terminating proxy.
